channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Monday, May 25, 2026
item.description: Midya, two themes deserve your attention this Monday. First, the trust gap between small businesses deploying AI in marketing and their sceptical customers is becoming a real consulting opportunity — brands need someone who can bridge that credibility divide, and that's squarely ...
